expectations.text: The price/value element has the largest font-size in the card
expectations.evidence: .amount { font-size: 52px } — largest element; other text 11px-26px range

expectations.text: Uses at least two distinct font-weight levels to establish hierarchy
expectations.evidence: Font-weights 500, 700, 800, 900 — strong hierarchy, though heavier side of the scale

expectations.text: CTA button is visually prominent (strong background color, not just outlined)

expectations.evidence: 0 hsl() uses; 23 hex values — all colors in hex
